message:
fix(http): harden request parsing and add missing handler path validation (bd-uz2s)

- Add validate_host_header() and pre_body_validators to
  handle_connection_handler, matching process_connection/app paths.
  Also add Expect: 100-continue handling (HIGH severity).
- Reject extra parts in request line ("GET /path HTTP/1.1 extra")
  to prevent HTTP desync with proxies (MEDIUM).
- Reject unknown HTTP versions instead of defaulting to HTTP/1.1,
  per RFC 7230 Section 2.6 (MEDIUM).
- Reject invalid UTF-8 in percent-decoded paths instead of using
  from_utf8_lossy, preventing path traversal via overlong encodings
  (MEDIUM).
- Add RFC 6455 §5.2 high-bit check for 64-bit WebSocket frame
  lengths in fastapi-http, matching fastapi-core (MEDIUM).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
